phase: P5 final user validation feedback template

classification_guidance.real_p5_blocker: Blocks M5 closeout or final user-style validation from starting.
classification_guidance.m5_closeout_fix: Should be fixed before M5 closeout is accepted.
classification_guidance.p5_final_user_validation_feedback: Valid feedback from the final user-style pass that does not reopen M5 stage scope.
classification_guidance.p6_product_shell_later_issue: Belongs to later product shell or packaging work rather than M5 closeout.
classification_guidance.out_of_scope_cloud_or_commercial_request: Requests cloud/deployment/commercial scope not claimed in P5/M5.
